sections.title: Hosanna to the Son of David
sections.author: Dan Schutte
sections.snippet: Hosanna to the Son of David! O blest is he, O blest is he who comes in the name of the Lord!

sections.author: Let Us All Rejoice
sections.snippet: Hosanna in the highest! Hosanna in the highest! Blessed are you, who have come in your abundant mercy! Hosanna in the highest! Hosanna in the highest!

sections.author: Sarah Hart
sections.snippet: My God, my God, why have you abandoned me?

sections.author: Spirit & Psalm
sections.snippet: Christ became obedient to the point of death, even death on a cross. Because of this, God greatly exalted him and bestowed on him the name which is above every name.

sections.title: The Jesus Song
sections.author: Tom Booth
sections.snippet: Lord Jesus Christ, Son of God, have mercy on me, have mercy on me. Lord Jesus Christ, Son of God, have mercy on me, have mercy on me. Amen.

sections.author: Let Us All Rejoice
sections.snippet: Father if this chalice cannot pass without my drinking it, Your will be done.

sections.title: Were You There
sections.author: WERE YOU THERE
sections.snippet: Were you there when they crucified my Lord? Were you there when they crucified my Lord? Oh! Sometimes it causes me to tremble, tremble, tremble. Were you there when they crucified my Lord?

sections.title: Jesus, Remember Me
sections.author: Jacques Berthier / Taizé Community
sections.snippet: Jesus, remember me when you come into your kingdom. Jesus, remember me when you come into your kingdom.

sections.title: Can We Love
sections.author: Tom Booth
sections.snippet: Can we love? Can we lay down our lives? Can we wear his crown of thorns? Can we drink the cup that he drinks? We must lay down our lives!

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Lord have mercy! Christ have mercy! Lord have mercy!

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Glory to God! Glory to God in the highest, and on earth, peace to people of goodwill.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Holy, holy, holy Lord God of hosts. Heaven and earth are full of your glory. Hosanna in the highest. Blessed is he who comes in the moment of the Lord. Hosanna in the highest.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: When we eat this breadand drink this cup, we proclaim your death, O Lord, until you come again.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.  Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.  Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world. Grant us, grant us peace.
